svg.title: Interactive canonical agent and skill hierarchy
svg.desc: Select an agent to highlight its skills, or select a skill to highlight every canonical agent using it. Setup-time stack and domain skills are intentionally omitted because canonical roles do not link to them.
svg.text: Choose an agent or skill. Trace its relationships.
Click to select. Double-click to view its definition. Enter or Space selects; Clear selection or Escape resets.
All agents and skills shown. Connections are intentionally faint until selection.

g.aria-label: Select an agent or skill to view its definition
